summary: Director Pod Access feature tested end-to-end. All 17 backend tests passed, 14 UI tests passed. Directors can: see escalated athletes on Mission Control dashboard (EscalationsCard shows 9 open escalations), navigate to athlete pods via escalation links with ?escalation= URL param, see EscalationBanner with action buttons (Acknowledge*, Add Guidance, Assign Task, Resolve), add guidance notes, create intervention tasks, and resolve escalations. Role-based views work correctly: Directors see DirectorView with EscalationsCard; Coaches see CoachView without DirectorView. ActionBar hidden for directors (only coaches see it). EscalationBanner shows in compact chip mode for non-directors.
critical_code_review_comments: Field name mismatch fix verified: frontend correctly uses action_id (not 'id') for escalation identification
EscalationsCard correctly integrated in DirectorView.js and renders escalations from mission-control API
EscalationBanner.js correctly uses escalation.action_id for API calls (acknowledge, resolve)
SupportPod.js correctly reads ?escalation= URL param and finds activeEscalation by action_id
Role-based rendering works: isDirector check hides ActionBar for directors, shows EscalationBanner in chip mode for non-directors

success_rate.backend: 100% (38 tests passed - 21 from test_director_actions.py + 17 from test_director_pod_access.py)

seed_data_creation: Used existing escalation da_4eee6ca096f6 for athlete_2 (Olivia Anderson). Tests created additional escalations via POST /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/escalate for workflow testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Director Pod Access feature fully functional. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/mission-control (returns escalations for director), GET /api/support-pods/{athlete_id} (returns escalations array), POST /api/director/actions/{id}/acknowledge, POST /api/director/actions/{id}/resolve, POST /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/director-notes, POST /api/support-pods/{athlete_id}/director-tasks. UI tested: EscalationsCard on DirectorView shows escalations with 'Open Pod' links, clicking navigates to /support-pods/{athlete_id}?escalation={action_id}, EscalationBanner renders with action buttons for directors, ActionBar hidden for directors.
